message:
🐛 Fix cluster cache not respecting demo mode toggle

When switching to demo mode, the clusters page was still showing live
cluster data because:

1. fullFetchClusters() tried agent first even in demo mode
2. Agent data would auto-disable demo mode (removed)
3. localStorage cluster cache wasn't cleared on demo mode toggle

Changes:
- fullFetchClusters() now returns demo data immediately when isDemoMode()
- Removed auto-disable of demo mode when agent has data
- Added demo mode subscription to clear cluster localStorage cache
- Reset cluster cache to demo data when switching to demo mode

This ensures the Clusters page shows demo data (kind-local, minikube,
eks-prod-us-east-1, etc.) when demo mode is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
